info.name: Snowflake Warehouse API
info.description:
The Snowflake Warehouse API is a REST API that you can use to access, customize and manage virtual warehouse in a Snowflake account.

Contact Support:
 Name: Snowflake, Inc.
 Email: support@snowflake.com

request.description: Describes the warehouse, show information of the chosen warehouse. Equivalent to DESCRIBE WAREHOUSE in SQL.

response.name: successful
